name: DevilReversi
short_description: "Devil Reversi" is a groundbreaking battle game that redefines Reversi. Two demon kings battle using humanity as their playthings. Utilize special abilities and magic in strategic matches with stunning graphics and immersive sound. Enjoy robust online multiplayer to compete with players worldwide.
detailed_description:
The first shot of the Common Sense Destruction Series!

Devil Revesi is an entirely new game that challenges conventional Reversi gameplay.

Adding new rules to the traditional one, as well as systems and animation unique to digital games, will make you feel like you have a brand-new experience.

■Devilish System

・"Pile" your disk on the grid where another disk is already on!!

・"Sacrifice" your disks and summon a "Totem" so your opponent cannot pile on it anymore!!

■3Modes awaits you

・You will learn how to play and devise a strategy of Devil Reversi through accomplishing questions from a servant of Devil Kings in Story Mode.

・Several difficulty of AI will train you in Single Player Mode.

・Need more thrill? Seek your rivals all over the world! Online Mode allows you to play against players worldwide.

■Staff

＜Character Design＞

George Kamitani

Hitoshi Sakimoto

■Cast

Vritra (Voice: Yurina Uchiyama)

Astra (Voice: Mayu Sagara)
